title: Number Line
statement:
A \emph{number line} for a linearly ordered system $(A,<_A)$ is a linearly ordered set of points $L$ together with an order isomorphism $\lambda:A\to L$, so that for all $a,a'\in A$,
\[
a<_A a' \Longleftrightarrow \lambda(a) \text{ lies to the left of } \lambda(a').
\]
